name: Ring of Truth

spell.name: Ring of Truth
spell.cast: *Nethys Note: No cast time was printed*
spell.critical_success: The target is so convincing that the bell rings even if they lie.
spell.success: If the target lies and succeeds at their Deception check against all targets, the bell still rings.
spell.failure: The bell accurately sees through their deception and will never ring if they lie.

text: You designate an area in which lies are revealed. Creatures in the area also take a –2 status penalty to Deception checks. Each time a creature in the area speaks a true statement, the soft ring of a bell sounds in the area. Creatures are aware of the magic; therefore, they can avoid answering questions to which they would normally respond with a lie, or they can be evasive as long as they remain within the boundaries of the truth. If a creature is in the area when the spell is cast or later enters the area, that creature attempts a Will save. It uses the results of this initial save if it leaves and reenters the area.
